name: Mccalls Best Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease two eight-inch pans or a 13x9 inch baking pan well and flour.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, soda, cinnamon, cloves, and pepper.
4. In a large bowl, use an electric mixer at high speed to beat the butter, sugars, eggs, and vanilla until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Scrape the sides of the bowl occasionally with a scraper.
5. At low speed, alternately add the flour mixture (in fourths) and buttermilk (in thirds), beginning and ending with the flour. Beat in until smooth, about one minute.
6. Pour batter into prepared pans.
7. Bake until the surface springs back when gently touched with fingertips. The layers should bake for 30-35 minutes, and the oblong cake should bake for 45 minutes.
8. Cool in pans on wire racks.
9. Frost as desired (white frosting is recommended, but caramel, mocha, or spiced frostings can also be used).
